title: Input schema of the Multimodal Dataset Scraper

startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: Forum URLs to scrape for images and descriptions.

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Requests per Crawl
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of pages to scrape.

imageSelectors.title: Image CSS Selectors
imageSelectors.description: CSS selectors to find images on pages (e.g., '.post-image img', 'article img').

descriptionSelectors.title: Description CSS Selectors
descriptionSelectors.description: CSS selectors to find image descriptions or captions.

minImageWidth.title: Minimum Image Width (px)
minImageWidth.description: Filter out images smaller than this width.

minImageHeight.title: Minimum Image Height (px)
minImageHeight.description: Filter out images smaller than this height.

downloadImages.title: Download Images
downloadImages.description: Whether to download and store images (may increase storage).

includeMetadata.title: Include Metadata
includeMetadata.description: Include page title, author, date, and other metadata.
